The story WhitepaperStaking

“KAI was once the most feared feline in all of crypto.“

Once he retired from crypto though, he found a quiet little fish pond to enjoy the rest of his days feasting on fishies. 

But now, rumors of a blockchain war between dogs and cats have forced KAI out of retirement. KAI is now getting back into the fight, leaving his full fish pond unattended. 

Luckily for you, fisherman, you get to raid his pond while he puts the crypto cats back on top. That means fishing in a pool full of ridiculously high staking rewards!

As seen on

Liquidity - 15%

Ensuring smooth transactions and stable market conditions, 15% of tokens bolster the Liquidity Litter.

Staking - 15%

To encourage holding and investment in the network, 15% of tokens are allocated to staking.

Presale - 20%

Launching with a bonus for early pouncers, 20% of KAI tokens are available during the presale.

Feline Flux- 25%

A significant 25% is set aside for Feline Flux, our marketing initiative designed to spread the word about KAI.

Purr Points - 25%

A full 25% is dedicated to Purr Points, rewarding the community for engagements and contributions.

Doge Catcher

Here’s where KAI becomes the hero he was always destined to be. As KAI climbs into the billions, the world takes notice. The dogs begin running scared of the fierce feline as he stalks them, and hunts them down. Total domination. Total victory. KAI ushers in a new era in crypto–the age of the Kitty.

It’s KAI Time

Ever since KAI retired, dogs have owned the blockchain. Now that he’s back in the fight, he needs a gang of digital kitties ready to do battle with the canines. In Phase 2, KAI invites all fishermen to trade their rods for weapons. Are you ready to do battle and put the cats on top?

Fishing The $KAI Pond

While KAI transforms from a fisherman to a fighter, presale buyers get to reap the benefits. Buy and Stake to fish KAI’s Staking Pond. The delicious staking rewards will fatten you up, and give you the energy you need for the next phase.

What is KAI?

KAI is the cat that will dethrone dog meme coins, and usher in a new era in crypto–the age of the Cat. He’s a retired kitty, out of shape from over eating fish from his pond. But, his pond is now open to all. Buy and Stake to fish KAI’s staking pond for crazy rewards.

When Is $KAI Launch?

Launch will occur at the end of the final stage of the presale. Then, KAI will take the crypto world by storm and knock DOGE, SHIB, and BONK off the top of the crypto world, and usher in the era of the cat! IT’S KAI TIME!

What Is The KAI Staking Pond?

Throughout the entire presale, and beyond, buyers can earn BONUS tokens simply by staking their purchases in the Staking pond. The current reward percentage is displayed on the buy widget and in the KAI dashboard.

How To Buy KAI?

Currently, KAI can only be purchased on THIS PAGE. ETH, USDT, BNB and Card payments are accepted. First, download a Metamask wallet (or the wallet of your choice). Then, you’ll need some crypto (unless paying by card). Buy some crypto from your favorite exchange, and send it to your crypto wallet.

Then, connect your wallet to the KAI buy widget (at the top of this page), select the amount of $KAI you wish to buy, and pull the trigger!

If you’re having trouble buying, please join our telegram group and ask for assistance.

Where Are My KAI Tokens?

Once you have bought and/or staked your $KAI, you’ll see them displayed on both the buy widget, and in the Dashboard. Please make sure your purchase wallet is connected to the website in order to view your token balance.

What Chain Is KAI On?

KAI is a meme coin on the ethereum blockchain. It is an ERC20 token that has been thoroughly audited by Coinsult. Audit can be found at the top of this page.

When Is The KAI Presale?

The KAI presale is happening RIGHT NOW! That means you’re very early. And in crypto, you want to be early! Not only can you buy at the lowest price, but you can become a founding member of the KAI cat pack!

When Is My $KAI In My Wallet?

During the KAI presale, your tokens are visible on the dashboard and on the buy widget. Once the token launches, the claiming process goes live. This is when you will claim your $KAI tokens into your wallet for storage, staking, and trading.

How To Claim KAI?

All claiming related instructions will be reiterated upon launch. The Claiming process begins once KAI has been launched, and is done so using the wallet you made your initial purchase with.

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
